# Solid method, but oral bar not clearly cleared

## Synopsis
R3 view: method is sound and results are reproducible, but novelty is marginal.

## Summary
The paper runs experiments and reports modest gains with reasonable analysis.

## Strengths
- Reasonable empirical setup

## Weaknesses
- [major] Missing baseline ABC on benchmark foo (§4.2)
- [major] Concurrent work overlap not addressed (§2)
- [minor] Figure 3 caption is sparse

## References
None.

## Recommendation
weak reject
Justification: 0 critical, 2 major, 1 minor. The oral bar requires clear new insight; missing baselines and uncovered concurrent work leave that bar unmet.
